name: tax
description: Tax rate + jurisdiction + exemption + calculation engine. Answers 'what tax is owed on this invoice line in this jurisdiction for this customer?'. Ships FOUR tables: `tax_rates` (per-jurisdiction rate rows with effective_from/effective_to time bounds — supports VAT changes at fiscal-year boundaries), `tax_jurisdictions` (country/state/city rule catalog — VAT / GST / Sales Tax / Consumption Tax / DIGITAL_SERVICES / ...), `tax_exemptions` (per-tenant exemption certificates — reseller / non-profit / diplomatic / rural / religious with certificate document + expiry + jurisdiction scope), `tax_calculations` (per-invoice-line tax computation record — immutable audit trail of which rate applied when, plus the provider that computed it if external). MultipleInstanceManager pattern via `TaxProviderManager` with 5 driver day-1: **TaxJar** (US-focused sales tax + international VAT), **Avalara AvaTax** (enterprise-grade global tax with per-SKU nexus), **Stripe Tax** (integrated with Stripe billing — automatic global tax on Stripe-processed transactions), **NativeCalculator** (built-in — reads tax_rates directly for simple jurisdictions; suitable for single-country tenants), **CustomWebhook** (generic HMAC-signed JSON escape hatch for tenant-run tax engines). Every invoice line runs through the provider for the customer's shipping/billing address — resolved via `TaxAddressResolver` from customer profile. Immutable calculation snapshot per invoice line — tax rate changes AFTER invoice issuance never retroactively re-tax historical invoices.
planned_consumers: coupon (Wave 4 — coupon redemption tax computation on discounted line items)
membership (Wave 4 — Finance Membership renewal charges resolve tax at issuance)
invoice (Wave 4 — every invoice line resolves tax via TaxCalculator + freezes a TaxCalculation snapshot)
transaction (Wave 4 — payment processing reads TaxCalculation snapshots for regulator reporting)

packages: guzzlehttp/guzzle ^7.8 (HTTP client for provider dispatch — retry-safe, connection-pooled, request-signable)
league/iso3166 ^4.3 (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code + ISO 3166-2 subdivision reference data)
league/flysystem-aws-s3-v3 ^3.0 (S3-signed URLs for exemption certificate document storage)
wraps.rationale: TaxJar / Avalara / Stripe Tax / Custom Webhook drivers dispatch through a shared Guzzle client with per-provider timeout + TLS validation. league/iso3166 backs the valid_country_code + valid_state_code validators (offline reference data — no HTTP required for validation). league/flysystem-aws-s3-v3 signs certificate_document_url values with time-limited access + tenant-scoped bucket prefixes so certificates never leak cross-tenant. Retry semantics for provider calls are OWNED BY THIS MODULE (via CalculateTaxForInvoiceLineJob idempotency + circuit-breaker) — Guzzle-level retry is disabled to preserve calculation-freeze semantics: a failed provider call must NEVER silently proceed to native fallback + risk under-charging tax.

tenant.description: Tenant-facing tax surface. Every route carries the `sanctum` guard + `X-Application-Id` header + `entitlement.enforce:tax_capture`. Owner + finance role author rates, jurisdictions + provider configs; admin + support role read the calculation ledger + exemption queue.

platform-admin.description: Cross-tenant support tooling. Ops + support review provider health, audit calculation drift, and inspect exemption queues cross-tenant.
